title: Magicam Crea
description: Magic centered pack using Iron's Spells as well as Ars. It incorporates other mods such as create to allow varied playstyles for all your friends.
body:
I created this pack for use between me and my friends. We often can't agree on a single style of playthrough, wether it be structure diving, PvE, Building, can't agree on if we want magic centered or machine centered. So I figured why not make it all of them. 

For magic users I've included Iron's Spells and Ars Nouveau.

If magic isn't your thing you can make use of the Create mod to construct factories and facilitate automation.

Enhanced world building though an assortment of world generators will give any builder a plethora of choices for scenery, or any adventurers a vivid world to explore.

Using ice and Fire there are plenty of creatures to keep the world alive, and many bosses to uncover and defeat using the Better Combat mod.

Enjoy vanilla based overhauled graphics using the Stay True Resource Pack
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true
